ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group classification of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_expenditure" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health expenditure record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the expenditure data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health expenditure as a percentage of total spending */,
  "source" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "indicator" TEXT /* Indicator description */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of health expenditure (e.g., public, private, out-of-pocket) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of health expenditure (e.g., hospital care, pharmaceuticals) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_expenditure_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_expenditure_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the indicator data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "source" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "indicator" TEXT /* Indicator description */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of economic indicator (e.g., GDP, inflation rate) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of economic indicator (e.g., GDP per capita, inflation rate for food) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality rating (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates for the data source (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user (e.g., university, government agency) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., country, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the report (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report the comment is associated with */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view reports, create reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
